<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.NamespaceDelegation">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-namespacedelegation">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">namespace</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">fingerprint of the root key defining the namespace</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">target_key</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningPublicKey</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">target key of getting full rights on the namespace (if target == namespace, it&#x27;s a root CA)</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">is_root_delegation</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bool</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">flag indicating whether the given delegation is a root delegation or not a root delegation is also allowed to issue other NamespaceDelegations.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">can_sign_all_mappings</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">CanSignAllMappings</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">

  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">

      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">CanSignSpecificMappings</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>

    <li><code>TOPOLOGY_MAPPING_CODE_SEQUENCING_DYNAMIC_PARAMETERS_STATE</code></li>
    
    <li><code>TOPOLOGY_MAPPING_CODE_PARTY_TO_KEY_MAPPING</code></li>
    
    <li><code>TOPOLOGY_MAPPING_CODE_SYNCHRONIZER_MIGRATION_ANNOUNCEMENT</code></li>
    
    <li><code>TOPOLOGY_MAPPING_CODE_SEQUENCER_CONNECTION_SUCCESSOR</code></li>
    
  </ul>
  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SigningPublicKey">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signingpublickey">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">format</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">CryptoKeyFormat</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">public_key</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Serialized public key in the format specified above</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">scheme</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeyScheme</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">No longer used (only kept for backwards compatibility) stores both the crypto key scheme and algorithm.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">usage</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated SigningKeyUsage</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Explicitly state the key&#x27;s intended use</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">key_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeySpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The key specification that was used to generate the key pair</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

</AccordionGroup>


</div>

<div className="x2mdx-ref-right-rail" role="complementary" aria-label="Examples and responses">
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">grpcurl</span>
  
</div>

```bash grpcurl
# Add -plaintext if the server is not using TLS.
grpcurl \
  -d @ \
  <HOST:PORT> \
  com.digitalasset.canton.topology.admin.v30.TopologyManagerReadService/ListNamespaceDelegation <<'EOF'
{
  "baseQuery": {
    "store": {
      "authorized": {}
    },
    "proposals": true,
    "operation": "TOPOLOGY_CHANGE_OP_UNSPECIFIED",
    "snapshot": "string",
    "filterSignedKey": "string",
    "protocolVersion": 0
  },
  "filterNamespace": "string",
  "filterTargetKeyFingerprint": "string"
}
EOF
```

</div>
  </div>
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code x2mdx-ref-rail-code--response">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">OK</span>
  
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-response-label">application/json</span>
  
</div>

```json OK
{
  "results": [
    {
      "context": {
        "store": {
          "authorized": {}
        },
        "sequenced": "string",
        "validFrom": "string",
        "validUntil": "string",
        "operation": "TOPOLOGY_CHANGE_OP_UNSPECIFIED",
        "transactionHash": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
        "serial": 0,
        "signedByFingerprints": [
          "string"
        ]
      },
      "item": {
        "namespace": "string",
        "targetKey": {
          "format": "CRYPTO_KEY_FORMAT_UNSPECIFIED",
          "publicKey": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
          "scheme": "SIGNING_KEY_SCHEME_UNSPECIFIED",
          "usage": [
            "SIGNING_KEY_USAGE_UNSPECIFIED"
          ],
          "keySpec": "SIGNING_KEY_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED"
        },
        "isRootDelegation": true,
        "canSignAllMappings": {}
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

</div>
  </div>
  
</div>

</div>
